title: Golgotha Base
wikitext:
'''Golgotha Base''' (ゴルゴタベース, ''Gorugota Bēsu'') is a branch of [[Nerv]] in the [[Rebuild of Evangelion|Rebuild continuity]].

Nothing is known about it so far except that it built the [[Dummy System|dummy system]] (DMYSYS) and sent it to [[Nerv Headquarters]] within an "ultra-secret sealed module". "Golgotha" is a reference to the site where Jesus Christ was crucified, "the place of the skull".<ref>[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calvary Wikipedia. Calvary.] Retrieved 2011-02-17.</ref>
